scope: Long M4 vocabulary expansion draft. Adds safety equipment, pilot/boarding transfer, deck operations, hull/fuel controls, bilge monitoring, muster/person-count and evacuation vocabulary. Draft only: do not merge into starter or deploy to production in this sprint.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Lifebuoy is throwable equipment, not wearable lifejacket or raft.
Wearable equipment must stay distinct from throwable equipment.
Heaving line is a line-transfer tool, not a mooring line or anchor action.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: boat hook / boat rope / fire hook
qa_notes.linguist_note: Deck tool identity must remain exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: gangway net / gangway light / pilot ladder
qa_notes.linguist_note: Gangway net is boarding safety gear, not lighting or ladder.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: pilot ladder / boarding ladder / pilot boat
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pilot transfer ladder must not become boarding ladder or vessel.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: boarding ladder / pilot ladder / gangway net
qa_notes.linguist_note: Boarding ladder is not pilot ladder or administrative boarding pass.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: fire extinguisher / fire alarm / first aid kit
qa_notes.linguist_note: Firefighting equipment must remain separate from alarm or medical kit.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: first aid kit / repair kit / fire extinguisher
qa_notes.linguist_note: Medical kit must not collapse into repair/fire equipment.
Emergency steering component must remain exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: bilge alarm / bilge pump / fire alarm
qa_notes.linguist_note: Bilge alarm is monitoring, not pump or fire alarm.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: fuel shutoff / fuel pump / water shutoff
qa_notes.linguist_note: Fuel isolation control must not become fuel pump or leak.
Hull valve term must remain exact.
Internal access path must not become gangway.
Deck area must not become cabin or aft area.
Pilot transfer preparation must keep action and ladder type exact.
Recovery command must not reverse into deployment.
Prepare is not throw, and line type must remain exact.
Boarding access command must not become route/fairway.
Deck area and action must remain exact.
Hull valve command must preserve valve identity and action.
Monitoring check must not become pump check or alarm silencing.
Fuel isolation polarity is safety-critical.
Emergency steering equipment command must remain exact.
Muster location and action must remain exact.
People count must not become report or wrong location.
Tool handoff must not become throwing or wrong tool.
Equipment test must not become use or wrong equipment.
Medical kit command must keep action and kit type exact.
Pilot ladder lighting must keep ladder type exact.

items.source_text: Установите лоцманский трап по левому борту.
items.target_text: Rig pilot ladder on port side.
accepted_answers: Rig pilot ladder on port side.
Rig the pilot ladder on port side

should_accept: Rig pilot ladder on port side.
Rig the pilot ladder on port side
should_reject: Rig pilot ladder on starboard side
Rig boarding ladder on port side
Remove pilot ladder on port side
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pilot transfer side and ladder type are operationally critical.

accepted_answers: Pilot ladder is ready for boarding

should_accept: Pilot ladder is ready for boarding
should_reject: Pilot ladder not ready for boarding
dangerous_minimal_pairs: ready/not ready; pilot ladder/boarding ladder/pilot boat
qa_notes.linguist_note: Readiness status and equipment identity must remain exact.

accepted_answers: Secure the gangway with safety net

should_accept: Secure the gangway with safety net
should_reject: Secure pilot ladder with safety net
qa_notes.linguist_note: Boarding safety net requirement must not be removed.

items.source_text: Спасательный круг сброшен по правому борту.
accepted_answers: Lifebuoy is deployed on starboard side

should_accept: Lifebuoy is deployed on starboard side
qa_notes.linguist_note: Side, equipment, and deploy/recover status must remain exact.

accepted_answers: Recover the heaving line from water

should_accept: Recover the heaving line from water
qa_notes.linguist_note: Line type and source location must remain exact.

accepted_answers: Fire extinguisher is ready in cockpit

should_accept: Fire extinguisher is ready in cockpit
should_reject: Fire extinguisher not ready in cockpit
qa_notes.linguist_note: Equipment, readiness, and location must remain exact.

items.target_text: First aid kit brought to deck.
accepted_answers: First aid kit brought to deck.
First aid kit is brought to deck

should_accept: First aid kit brought to deck.
First aid kit is brought to deck
should_reject: Fire aid kit brought to deck
First aid kit brought below deck
qa_notes.linguist_note: Medical equipment and location must stay exact.

accepted_answers: Emergency tiller is fitted and tested

should_accept: Emergency tiller is fitted and tested
qa_notes.linguist_note: Emergency steering readiness must preserve component and test status.
Immediate hull-valve command must not change action or system.

items.source_text: Сигнализация трюма звучит в кормовой каюте.
items.target_text: Bilge alarm sounding in aft cabin.
accepted_answers: Bilge alarm sounding in aft cabin.
Bilge alarm is sounding in aft cabin

should_accept: Bilge alarm sounding in aft cabin.
Bilge alarm is sounding in aft cabin
should_reject: Fire alarm sounding in aft cabin
Bilge pump sounding in aft cabin
Bilge alarm sounding in forward cabin
qa_notes.linguist_note: Alarm identity and location are response-critical.
Fuel isolation status must preserve system and polarity.

items.source_text: Держите носовую палубу свободной от незакрепленных предметов.
items.target_text: Keep foredeck clear of loose gear.
accepted_answers: Keep foredeck clear of loose gear.
Keep the foredeck clear of loose gear

should_accept: Keep foredeck clear of loose gear.
Keep the foredeck clear of loose gear
should_reject: Keep aft deck clear of loose gear
Keep foredeck full of loose gear
qa_notes.linguist_note: Deck hazard control must preserve area and hazard.

items.source_text: Сейчас пересчитайте всех людей на борту.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Emergency headcount must preserve action, object, and location.

accepted_answers: Muster the passengers on main deck

should_accept: Muster the passengers on main deck
qa_notes.linguist_note: Muster command must preserve people group, location, and action.

accepted_answers: Boat hook is passed to bow

should_accept: Boat hook is passed to bow
qa_notes.linguist_note: Tool and station must remain exact.

items.target_text: Boarding ladder not safe to use.
accepted_answers: Boarding ladder not safe to use.
Boarding ladder is not safe to use

should_accept: Boarding ladder not safe to use.
Boarding ladder is not safe to use
should_reject: Pilot ladder not safe to use
Boarding ladder not ready to use
qa_notes.linguist_note: Safety polarity and ladder type must not drift.
Evacuation access status must preserve access point and purpose.

accepted_answers: Illuminate the pilot ladder before transfer

should_accept: Illuminate the pilot ladder before transfer
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pilot transfer safety setup must preserve timing and equipment.

accepted_answers: Report the pilot safely on board

should_accept: Report the pilot safely on board
should_reject: Report pilot not safely on board
qa_notes.linguist_note: Pilot transfer status report must preserve person and safety status.

items.source_text: Доложите: один человек отсутствует на палубе.
items.target_text: Report one person missing from deck.
accepted_answers: Report one person missing from deck.
Report one person is missing from deck

should_accept: Report one person missing from deck.
Report one person is missing from deck
should_reject: Report two persons missing from deck
Report one person found on deck
Report one person missing from quay
qa_notes.linguist_note: Missing-person count and location must remain exact.

grammar_patterns.pattern: rig ladder on named side instruction
examples: Rig pilot ladder on port side.
First aid kit brought to deck.
Bilge alarm sounding in aft cabin.
Keep foredeck clear of loose gear.

grammar_patterns.pattern: equipment not safe to use status
examples: Boarding ladder not safe to use.
Report one person missing from deck.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: pilot ladder / boarding ladder / pilot boat

Rig pilot ladder on starboard side
Rig boarding ladder on port side
phrase_b020_pilot_ladder_ready_boarding_: Pilot ladder not ready for boarding

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Boarding access and fairway terms must stay separate.
Line type and handling action must remain exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: fire extinguisher / first aid kit / fire alarm

phrase_b020_first_aid_kit_to_deck_001: First aid kit brought to deck.

phrase_b020_fire_extinguisher_ready_cock: Fire extinguisher not ready in cockpit
phrase_b020_first_aid_kit_to_deck_001: Fire aid kit brought to deck
First aid kit brought below deck

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Fire and medical equipment boundaries must remain strict.
Hull valve and fuel isolation actions are safety-critical.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: bilge alarm / bilge pump / fire alarm

phrase_b020_bilge_alarm_sounding_aft_cab: Bilge alarm sounding in aft cabin.
Fire alarm sounding in aft cabin
Bilge pump sounding in aft cabin

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Bilge monitoring must not become pump operation or fire alarm.
Emergency steering component and fitted/tested status must remain exact.

phrase_b020_keep_foredeck_clear_gear_001: Keep foredeck clear of loose gear.
Keep aft deck clear of loose gear
Keep foredeck full of loose gear

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Deck area and evacuation access terms must stay distinct.

phrase_b020_report_one_person_missing_de: Report one person missing from deck.
Report two persons missing from deck
Report one person found on deck

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: People-accounting commands must preserve action, count, and location.
Boat hook handoff must not become throwing or wrong station.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: pilot safely on board / not safely / ashore

phrase_b020_report_pilot_safely_on_board: Report pilot not safely on board

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Pilot transfer preparation and final status must remain exact.

phrase_b020_boarding_ladder_not_safe_001: Boarding ladder not safe to use.
Pilot ladder not safe to use

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Boarding safety polarity must not reverse.
